Finance · MIS · Data Analytics

Sara Shahini

Finance & MIS student at the University of Arizona with a global perspective — Swiss-based, internationally experienced, data-driven.

About

Who I Am

I'm a Finance and Management Information Systems student at the Eller College of Management, University of Arizona, graduating December 2026. I combine financial acumen with a technical edge in data analytics and information systems.

My background is international by nature — raised in Switzerland, educated in Belgium and the US, and having worked across Denver, Miami, and Zug. I thrive in cross-functional, multicultural environments and bring fluency in French, English, and German.

I'm drawn to roles at the intersection of technology and finance, where data-driven thinking creates real business impact.
